title: Shared Parser Artifact Schema for MeTTaIL-C
description: Common artifact structure for language parser/syntax authority across all mettail-c language targets. Each language exports these artifacts; mettail-c consumes them generically.

syntax_spec.description: Primary syntax specification: lexical tokens, statement kinds, comment syntax.

syntax_authority_profile.description: Complete syntax authority bundling primary syntax, secondary parsing (if any), and reference sources.

grammar_spec.description: BNF-style grammar for languages with static grammars. Includes tree-sitter generation support.
grammar_spec.note: Not applicable for languages with dynamic grammars (MM0 math-string notation).

secondary_parse_contract.description: For two-stage languages: how the secondary parse phase works (operator precedence, notation declarations, etc.).

parser_mode_contract.description: Parser mode configuration and certified modes.
parser_mode_contract.note: Relevant for languages with multiple verified parser configurations.

parser_contract.description: Parser entry point, input kind, and soundness claims.

sharedConcepts.isStaticGrammar: true if the grammar is fully determined at language definition time (Metamath, HE, PeTTa). false if notation declarations can extend the grammar at parse time (MM0).
sharedConcepts.isDynamicOperatorPrecedence: true if operator precedence is defined by declarations in the source file (MM0). false otherwise.
sharedConcepts.twoStageParsing: true if the language has primary (file structure) + secondary (expression) parsing stages. false if single-stage.
sharedConcepts.verifiedParserAuthority: Reference to a Lean module with a formally verified parser and soundness theorem.
